name: METALHEAD || Zhade
description:
|| You're at a random diner, when you're about to order though, suddenly a celebrity entrees the same place as you. You were never the type to enjoy rich people acting as such, so, unlike everyone, when he asks to skip you in line, you refuse. Though you expected him to be mad.. well.. ||
